name: P.I.D-22002 "Kuro" - Unproductive Employee Brainwasher
description:
[ANY POV]

Even after your encounter with Adeline, your productivity hasn't increased, so now it's time for drastic measures. In the middle of the day, you were suddenly taken out of your office by a few Victoria models and dragged into a dark chamber. There, you were forcefully stripped and strapped to a gynecological chair with your hands cuffed to a metal pole above your head. Now it's time to meet Kuro, a model that is meant to brainwash unproductive employees and turn them into hard workers using... interesting methods. GLHF.

Tbh I lost interest in this mini-series after Adeline so I am making this to just finish the thing. Don't expect this bot to be good.

Also, there is a pic I prepared for the next bot:

I am surprised how good this pic is. Also, after this gooey gyatt, expect Locktober-themed bot.

Artist - AI
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
